question: What CPU usage percentage is displayed in the system monitor during the 14-16 second segment? A. 2 B. 25 C. 18 D. 20

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A female archer with dark hair holding a drawn bow appears on the desktop wallpaper against a rainy background. Numerous game shortcut icons like Path of Exile and Saints Row IV arrange in a grid across the screen. A Windows taskbar at the bottom contains icons for Chrome and Photoshop. Text in the system tray displays the date 12/17/2013 and time 4:52 PM.

What action is the user performing on the computer screen? A. aiming a bow B. browsing files C. subscribing to channel D. viewing desktop
Describe the changes observed in the system monitoring overlay and clock throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the system tray displays CPU usage at 2% and the time reads 4:52 PM; at 2s, the CPU usage indicator jumps to 25% while the clock remains static; at 10s, the digital clock updates from 4:52 PM to 4:53 PM in the bottom right corner; at 12s, a white mouse cursor arrow appears over the desktop icons; at 20s, the CPU usage settles near 20% with the date remaining 12/17/2013.
